zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Strathearn於大約1180年出生時，她的父親Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn31歲，母親Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn39歲。她和Walter de Ruthven至少有1個兒子。她去世於1250年之後在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Strathearn于大约1180年出生时，她的父亲Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn31岁，母亲Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn39岁。她和Walter de Ruthven至少有1个儿子。她去世于1250年之后在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Strathearn was born about 1180, her father, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, was 31 and her mother, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, was 39. She had at least 1 son with Walter de Ruthven. She died after 1250, in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Strathearn est née environ 1180, son père, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Walter de Ruthven. Elle est décédée après 1250, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Strathearn um 1180 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn 31 und ihre Mutter Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn 39. Sie hatte mit Walter de Ruthven mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1250 in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Strathearn è nata il circa 1180, sua padre, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, aveva 39 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Walter de Ruthven. Morì dopo il 1250, nel Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Strathearnが約1180年に生まれた時，父Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearnは31歳，母Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearnは39歳であった。彼女はWalter de Ruthvenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1250年以後にイギリススコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Strathearn(이)가 대략 1180년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Walter de Ruthven(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Strathearn nasceu aproximadamente 1180, seu pai, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Walter de Ruthven. Ela faleceu após 1250, em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Strathearn родилась около 1180 г., её отцу по имени Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, 39. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Walter de Ruthven. Она умерла после 1250 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Strathearn nació aproximadamente 1180, su papá, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Walter de Ruthven. Murió después de 1250, en Escocia, Reino Unido.
